title: Happy Farm Animals
description: A fun coloring sheet featuring simple farm animal outlines that helps children learn about common animals found on a farm while developing fine motor skills.
instructions: Color the farm animals using your favorite colors. Try to use colors that match what these animals might look like in real life!

content.image: A farm scene with simple outlines of a cow, pig, chicken, sheep, and horse. Each animal is drawn with clear black lines on a white background, with enough space between them for easy coloring.
learningFacts: Cows give us milk that we can drink or use to make cheese
Pigs are very smart animals that can learn tricks
Chickens lay eggs that we can eat
Sheep's wool is used to make warm clothing
Horses have helped farmers work for thousands of years
